levels.hint: 用 No there isn't 否定并补充信息

items.answer: After comparing both narratives I choose this one.

items.zh: 相比之下这个评价更高。
items.answer: In comparison this one gets higher remarks.

items.en: Compared to the horrible one this is much better.
items.answer: 跟那个可怕的比，这个好多了。

items.en: I feel lonely there. Compared to here it's worse.
items.answer: 我在那里感到孤独。跟这里比更糟。

items.en: Compared to money happiness is more important.
items.answer: 跟钱比，幸福更重要。

pipeline.title: 对比评价 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: Compared to ___, this is ___. / This one is ___ than that but ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 跟...比，这个更...。/ 这个比那个...但...。

items.zh: 跟另一个比，这个好多了。
items.answer: Compared to the other one this is much better.

items.zh: 这个更便宜但质量更差。
items.answer: This one is cheaper than that but the quality is lower.
items.pattern: This one is ___ than that but ___.

items.answer: This one is faster than that but the battery is worse.
items.pattern: This one is ___ than that but ___.

pipeline.title: 对比评价 · 一词多句

patterns.chunk: Compared to ___, this is ___. / ___ is ___ than ___ but ___ is ___.

items.zh: 跟旧的比，这个手机好多了。
items.answer: Compared to the old one this phone is much better.

items.zh: 这部手机更快但电池更差。
items.answer: This phone is faster but the battery is worse.

patterns.chunk: It's not the ___, but it's the most ___. / It's the same ___ but ___.

items.answer: It's not the fastest but it's the most reliable.
It's the same price but it's more useful.

pipeline.title: 最高级推荐 · 中译英

items.answer: This is the best reference.
This is the best selection.
This is the best value for money.

pipeline.title: 最高级推荐 · 英译中

items.en: This is the best arrival time I recommend.
items.answer: 这是我推荐的最佳到达时间。

items.en: This producer is the most reliable one.
items.answer: 这个制作人是最可靠的。

items.en: This is the most engaging narrative I recommend.
items.answer: 这是最吸引人的叙述，我推荐。

pipeline.title: 最高级推荐 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: This is the best ___ in ___. / I recommend this one. It's the most ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 这是...最好的...。/ 我推荐这个。它是最...的。

items.zh: 这是这一片最好的餐厅。
items.answer: This is the best restaurant in this area.

items.zh: 我推荐这个。它是最受欢迎的菜。
items.answer: I recommend this one. It's the most popular dish here.
items.pattern: I recommend this one. It's the most ___.

items.answer: This is the best value for money.

pipeline.title: 最高级推荐 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本推荐
levels.en: This is the best restaurant.
levels.zh: 这是最好的餐厅。

levels.label: 加范围
levels.en: This is the best restaurant in this area.
levels.zh: 这是这一片最好的餐厅。

levels.label: 加理由
levels.en: This is the best restaurant in this area because the food is fresh and the service is great.
levels.zh: 这是这一片最好的餐厅，因为食物新鲜，服务也好。
levels.hint: 用 because 说明推荐理由

pipeline.title: 二选一比较 · 中译英

items.zh: 这两个选择中，修改还是重写？
items.answer: Between these two choose to revise or rewrite?

items.zh: 你要提交这个还是选另一个？
items.answer: Will you submit this one or choose the other?

items.zh: 两个方案中，哪个风险更低？
items.answer: Between these two which has lower risk of crash?

pipeline.title: 二选一比较 · 英译中

items.en: Between this firm and that one which is better?
items.answer: 这家公司和那家之间哪个更好？

items.en: Between these opponents which is stronger?
items.answer: 这两个对手哪个更强？

items.en: In an emergency which is more important?
items.answer: 紧急情况下哪个更重要？

pipeline.title: 二选一比较 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: Between ___ and ___, which is ___? / I like both but I like ___ more because ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: ...和...之间，哪个...？/ 两个都喜欢但我更喜欢...因为...。
slots: the bus and the subway faster

items.answer: Between the bus and the subway which is faster?

slotValues.slot1: the bus and the subway faster

items.answer: Between the phone and the tablet which is better?

items.zh: 两个我都喜欢，但我更喜欢这个，因为它更漂亮。
items.answer: I like both but I like this one more because it's prettier.
items.pattern: I like both but I like ___ more because ___.

pipeline.title: 二选一比较 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: Between A and B / Which do you prefer
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 在A和B之间/你更喜欢哪个

patterns.chunk: Between ___ and ___, which is ___? / I prefer ___ because ___.

items.answer: Between these two which is more comfortable?

items.zh: 我更喜欢这个因为它更实用。
items.answer: I prefer this one because it's more practical.

patterns.chunk: I've tried both and ___ is definitely ___. / Between A and B I'd choose ___.

items.zh: 两个我都试过，这个绝对更好。
items.answer: I've tried both and this one is definitely better.

items.zh: 在这两个中我会选这个。
items.answer: Between these two I'd choose this one.

pipeline.title: 多维度比较 · 中译英

items.zh: 从商业角度来看这个影响更大。
items.answer: From a commercial perspective this has more influence.

items.zh: 它的影响力更大但成本更高。
items.answer: It has more influence but the cost is higher.

items.zh: 这个推广效果更好但花费更多。
items.answer: This one promotes better but costs more.

pipeline.title: 多维度比较 · 英译中

items.en: This place is more romantic but more remote.
items.answer: 这个地方更浪漫但更偏远。

items.en: It has an edge in quality but falls short in price.
items.answer: 它在质量上有优势但价格不行。

items.en: This one is more remote yet more peaceful.
items.answer: 这个更偏远但更安静。

pipeline.title: 多维度比较 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: ___ is ___er and ___, but ___. / This one is more ___ but less ___.
slots: this phone lighter faster that one has a better camera
this restaurant cheaper the food is not as good
this car more expensive more comfortable

items.zh: 这部手机更轻更快，但那个相机更好。
items.answer: This phone is lighter and faster but that one has a better camera.

slotValues.slot1: this phone lighter faster that one has a better camera

items.zh: 这家餐厅更便宜但食物没那么好。
items.answer: This restaurant is cheaper but the food is not as good.

slotValues.slot1: this restaurant cheaper the food is not as good

items.answer: This car is more expensive but more comfortable.
items.pattern: This one is more ___ but more ___.

slotValues.slot1: this car more expensive more comfortable

pipeline.title: 多维度比较 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: but / however / on the other hand

patterns.chunk: ___ is ___er but ___. / This one is more ___ but less ___.

items.zh: 这个更便宜但质量没那么好。
items.answer: This one is cheaper but the quality is not as good.
This one is more convenient but more expensive.

patterns.chunk: On one hand ___. On the other hand ___. / All things considered ___.

items.zh: 一方面它更便宜。另一方面质量更差。
items.answer: On one hand it's cheaper. On the other hand the quality is lower.

items.zh: 综合考虑这是最好的选择。
items.answer: All things considered this is the best choice.

items.zh: 增长越来越快，影响不断扩大。
items.answer: The growth is getting faster and the influence is spreading.

items.zh: 问题在扩散，情况变得越来越糟。
items.answer: The problem is spreading and it's getting worse and worse.

items.zh: 价格越来越低，越来越便宜了。
items.answer: The price is getting lower and lower. It's becoming cheaper.

items.en: The election is getting more and more competitive.
items.answer: 选举变得越来越激烈了。

items.en: The racing industry is growing faster and faster.
items.answer: 赛车行业发展越来越快。

items.en: The technique is improving more and more.
items.answer: 技术越来越进步了。

pipeline.title: 变化描述 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: It's getting ___er and ___er every day. / __ is becoming more and more ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 一天比一天更...了。/ ...越来越...了。

items.answer: It's getting hotter and hotter every day.
He is becoming more and more confident.
It's getting colder and colder every day.

pipeline.title: 变化描述 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本变化
levels.en: It's getting hotter.
levels.zh: 越来越热了。

levels.label: 加强变化
levels.en: It's getting hotter and hotter.
levels.zh: 越来越热了。
levels.hint: 用 and 连接重复比较级

levels.label: 加对比
levels.en: It's getting hotter and hotter every day. Compared to last week today is much warmer.
levels.zh: 一天比一天热。跟上周比今天暖和多了。

pipeline.title: 性价比评价 · 中译英

items.zh: 这些商品质量不错价格也合理。
items.answer: These goods have good quality and reasonable prices.

items.zh: 从定义上讲这个性价比更高。
items.answer: By definition this offers better value.

items.zh: 这件东西质量扎实花得值。
items.answer: This substance is solid and worth the money.

pipeline.title: 性价比评价 · 英译中

items.en: The only issue is the price but it's still worth it.
items.answer: 唯一的问题是价格，但还是值得的。

items.en: There is a limit to how cheap you can go.
items.answer: 便宜也有个限度。

items.en: It's hardly cheap but the quality is worth it.
items.answer: 它不便宜，但质量值得。

pipeline.title: 性价比评价 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: This one is cheaper but ___. / It's worth the money because ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 这个更便宜但...。/ 它物有所值因为...。

items.zh: 这个更便宜但质量更差。
items.answer: This one is cheaper but the quality is lower.

items.zh: 它物有所值因为材料好。
items.answer: It's worth the money because the materials are good.
It's more expensive but it lasts longer.

pipeline.title: 性价比评价 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: worth the money / good value / overpriced
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 物有所值/性价比高/太贵

patterns.chunk: It's worth the money because ___. / It's good value for ___.

items.zh: 它物有所值因为质量好。
items.answer: It's worth the money because the quality is good.

items.zh: 对旅行者来说性价比高。
items.answer: It's good value for travelers.

patterns.chunk: It's not the cheapest but ___. / The more you pay the better ___.

items.zh: 不是最便宜的但最耐用。
items.answer: It's not the cheapest but it's the most durable.
The more you pay the better quality you get.

items.zh: 虽然有反对意见我仍然推荐这个。
items.answer: Despite the opposition I still recommend this.

items.zh: 考虑到它的影响力我推荐这个选择。
items.answer: Considering its influence I recommend this choice.

items.zh: 这个推荐正在传播越来越多的人采用。
items.answer: This recommendation is spreading. More people are adopting it.

items.en: I recommend transferring to this service.
items.answer: 我推荐转用这个服务。

items.en: Attach importance to quality as I recommend.
items.answer: 按我推荐的重视质量。

items.en: For a human being this is the best choice.
items.answer: 对一个人来说这是最好的选择。

pipeline.title: 综合推荐 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: All things considered ___ is the best choice because ___. / I highly recommend ___ because ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 综合考虑...是最好的选择因为...。/ 我强烈推荐...因为...。
slots: this beginners it's easy and affordable
this product it's durable and cheap
this hotel it's comfortable and convenient

items.zh: 综合考虑这对初学者最好，因为简单又便宜。
items.answer: All things considered this is the best choice for beginners because it's easy and affordable.
items.pattern: All things considered ___ is the best choice because ___.

slotValues.slot1: this beginners it's easy and affordable

items.zh: 我强烈推荐这个产品因为耐用又便宜。
items.answer: I highly recommend this product because it's durable and cheap.

slotValues.slot1: this product it's durable and cheap

items.zh: 我强烈推荐这家酒店因为舒适又方便。
items.answer: I highly recommend this hotel because it's comfortable and convenient.

slotValues.slot1: this hotel it's comfortable and convenient

pipeline.title: 综合推荐 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I recommend / I highly recommend / All things considered
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我推荐/我强烈推荐/综合考虑

patterns.chunk: I highly recommend ___. / All things considered ___ is the best ___.

items.answer: I highly recommend this product.

items.zh: 综合考虑这是最适合你的。
items.answer: All things considered this is the best choice for you.

patterns.chunk: I recommend ___ because not only ___ but also ___. / It's not the ___ but the most ___.

items.zh: 我推荐这个因为它不仅便宜而且耐用。
items.answer: I recommend this because it's not only cheap but also durable.

items.zh: 不是最便宜的但最方便。
items.answer: It's not the cheapest but the most convenient.

items.zh: 虽然有反对意见我仍然认为这是最好的。
items.answer: Despite the opposition I still think this is the best.

items.zh: 有些人批评这个方案但我认为它可行。
items.answer: Some people criticize this plan but I think it works.

items.zh: 他们认为这不合法但我觉得不一定。
items.answer: They think it's illegal but I'm not so sure.

items.en: I think cheating is wrong but some people don't.
items.answer: 我认为作弊不对，但有些人不这么认为。

items.en: This behavior is annoying however I understand.
items.answer: 这个行为很烦人，但我能理解。

items.en: Discipline is important but freedom is also necessary.
items.answer: 纪律很重要，但自由也是必要的。

pipeline.title: 观点对比 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: In my opinion ___. However some people ___ because ___. / I think ___ but some people think ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 在我看来...。然而有些人...因为...。/ 我认为...但有些人认为...。
slots: this one is better prefer that one it's cheaper
we should go prefer to stay they are tired
this is right think it's wrong they disagree

items.zh: 依我看这个更好。但有些人更喜欢那个因为更便宜。
items.answer: In my opinion this one is better. However some people prefer that one because it's cheaper.
items.pattern: In my opinion ___. However some people ___ because ___.

slotValues.slot1: this one is better prefer that one it's cheaper

items.zh: 我认为我们应该去。但有些人想留下因为他们累了。
items.answer: I think we should go. However some people prefer to stay because they are tired.
items.pattern: I think ___. However some people ___ because ___.

slotValues.slot1: we should go prefer to stay they are tired

items.zh: 我认为这是对的。但有人认为这是错的。
items.answer: I think this is right. However some people think it's wrong.
items.pattern: I think ___. However some people think ___.

slotValues.slot1: this is right think it's wrong

pipeline.title: 观点对比 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本观点
levels.en: In my opinion this is the best choice.
levels.zh: 在我看来这是最好的选择。

levels.label: 加对比
levels.en: In my opinion this is the best choice. However some people disagree.
levels.zh: 在我看来这是最好的选择。但有些人不同意。
levels.hint: 用 However 引出相反观点

levels.label: 完整表达
levels.en: In my opinion this is the best choice. However some people disagree because they think it's too expensive.
levels.zh: 在我看来这是最好的选择。但有些人不同意，因为他们觉得太贵。
